content:
Hello @everyone!
I'd like to position myself from here forward as an unofficial project coordinator, to help lift some weight off of Ace's shoulders. While browsing through the already uploaded files *(to test some things to set up a collaboration hub)*, **I noticed a possible issue with at least one of the files** and wanted to make sure everyone is aware this can happen and how to avoid it. I had this happen myself and had to figure it out.

The file I noticed this in was the **DE_Gameplay(Interlude_DissolutionRuins+VerbotenCovenant+LightlessRealm+PhantasmalDive)_Proofreading.csv**. Many of the non-english characters in the document become scrambled gibberish if saved in `CSV (Comma delimited) (*.csv)` format and re-opened in excel. **Standard .csv format doesn't always properly render these UTF-8 characters.**

If saving your files in Excel to .csv, **ALWAYS choose CSV UTF-8**, or your file may become corrupted!
Specifically, you need to go to the **"Save As"** tab, or if using the **"Export"** tab, click **"Save as Another File Type"**.

## This was confirmed by Ace to be of no concern, but it's still good practice if you're working in Excel!
